name: Mobile Flank Interdiction Template
description: Parameterized flank-interdiction COA with bounded tempo and exploitation options.

base_coa.name: Mobile Flank Interdiction
base_coa.description: Contest the junction early, split red momentum, and pressure the approach lanes before the assault can mass.

actions.notes: Confirm the direct thrust while the reserve moves.
Disrupt the staging area instead of reinforcing the center.
Support the reserve as it contests the junction.
Break the direct assault axis before it can build momentum.
Assess the remaining red support structure.
Exploit local disruption on the northern flank.
Enable the main-effort attack on RIDGE.

options.notes: Abort the flank and fold back into the center.
Shift exploitation back to the corridor.
